content.en:
Ye Tian had long known that the realm between the Eternal Realm, the Realm of the Realm of the Divine Realm, and the Demon Seed Abyss was not always there, but it was constantly increasing, but the frequency of increase was very slow, and it was possible to give birth to one after an endless long time.

And it is not permanent, and it may cause some boundaries to gradually crumble due to some factors.

Since the existence of the Boundary Seam Realm, there have been many Boundary Rift Realms that have disappeared.

"A newly born realm of the rift, if the human race occupies it, it will definitely be able to obtain a huge amount of resources from here!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And so.

He occupied this entrance for the first time, and arranged some realm gods here to guard it as a boundary rift.

To the ordinary human race, it is also said that this is a boundary crack, and only a very small number of middle-level realm gods who are allowed to enter here know that this is the boundary gap "827".

Ye Tian didn't want other top forces to know that a boundary rift was born here, in that case, other top forces would inevitably get involved.

Under normal circumstances, only one top force is allowed to participate in entering one Boundary Rift Realm, but if the newly conceived Boundary Rift Realm is rich in resources, it is enough for them to give up other Boundary Rift Realms.

Although the resources will be regenerated, and the speed of regeneration is very fast, in fact, the time for regeneration is getting longer and longer, and it will decrease to a certain extent.

After an infinite period of time, the level of resources born will even be reduced.

It is rumored that the reason why these resources are regenerated so quickly is entirely due to the consumption of the origin of the Boundary Seam Realm, which is also the reason why the Boundary Seam Realm will collapse.

Because the origin has been consumed, if there is no realm god to mine resources, then the origin of the boundary gap will not be consumed, but a large amount of resources will be taken, and the resources will not appear out of thin air, and the origin will inevitably be consumed.

As time goes by, the origin of the Boundary Gap Realm continues to decrease dramatically, and there will definitely be a day when it collapses.

Of course, the Boundary Gap will also instinctively adopt ways to save itself, such as the Silent Period.

It's like the boundary of the East Wu Boundary Seam, which has entered the silent period before, and uses the silent period to slowly restore the origin, which is also the speed of delaying the collapse of the boundary of the boundary crack.

"This Boundary Seam Realm is named the Endless Seam Realm!"

Ye Tian began to lead the middle-level realm gods of the human race to find the resources of this endless rift realm, but no matter who found the resources, half of them had to be given to the human race temple for cultivating other human races.

In the absence of the danger of the Demon Seed, this is simply a place to pick up resources.

Of course, there are also some native beings in this Endless Realm Rift Realm, but they are all relatively weak, and there are not many who have reached the Realm Gods, and the mid-level Realm Gods are enough to deal with these native creatures.

And once these native creatures are killed, there is no way to breed them quickly.

Every day, a large number of resources are sent into the Terran Temple, many of which are useful even for high-level realm gods, and even more for middle-level realm gods.

However, Ye Tian knew very well that it would not be long before this boundary crack realm would be discovered by the demon seeds.

Therefore, he must take the opportunity to take more resources, otherwise if he wants to take away resources in the future, he will have to kill the demon seeds, and it will be easier to expose this place.

Unconsciously.

Some time has passed.

this day.

Demon seeds have finally appeared in the realm of the Endless Seam, and a large number of demon seeds have poured in.

But Ye Tian had long expected this situation, so he let those weak middle-level realm gods withdraw as soon as possible, and several of his duplicate bodies were slaughtering demon seeds here.

He wants to kill these demon seeds and dare not send a large number of middle-level demon seeds in, otherwise there are too few middle-level realm gods of the human race, where can he compete with the demon seeds, he will not dare to fight, otherwise he will inevitably lose a lot of middle-level realm gods.

The human race has not yet risen completely, and it is weak among the top forces, where can it afford to lose!

So, he can only use it this way.

......

Ye Tian is a high-level realm god, and now he will also be suppressed by the Endless Realm Rift Realm, if it is a high-level demon seed that condenses nine eternal realm spirits to fight against him, it is still no matter how high or low.

Ye Tian was also able to condense the copy body of the mid-level peak realm divine cultivator, and the strength he exerted here would be greater.

This is the particularity of the boundary rift realm, the higher the cultivation, the lower the combat effectiveness.

But this is because Ye Tian's foundation is too strong to be able to fight beyond the level, so this situation will happen0 .....

As the years passed, Ye Tian killed more and more demon seeds, which also made the demon seed abyss extremely angry.

this day. []

The Demon Seed Abyss sent ten high-level peak demon seeds into the Endless Realm Seam Realm, such a scale exceeded the East Black Realm Seam Realm, and even the East Wu Realm Seam Realm couldn't get together ten high-level peak realm gods, and the Demon Seed Abyss was sent in at will.

These ten high-level peak demon seeds suddenly appeared, directly besieging and killing one of Ye Tian's copy bodies.

"The Demon Seed Abyss is really willing to spend blood, and the ten high-level peak demon seeds seem to be really annoyed, and they also attach great importance to this realm of the seam!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thereupon.

He copied the duplicate bodies of several mid-level peak realm god cultivators, so that his strength would not be suppressed, and he could also exert a high-level realm god combat power comparable to that of eight eternal realm spirits, which was enough to deal with those high-level peak realm gods whose strength was suppressed.

Soon.

Several of Ye Tian's mid-level peak realm god cultivators' copied bodies fought against these high-level peak demon species.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian's various Eternal Realm spiritual techniques burst out, fighting against these high-level peak demon species, and shattering this area.

And he still had the upper hand, and soon a high-level peak demon seed was killed by Ye Tian.

Seeing this scene, the other high-level peak demon species were all terrified.

They are not those ordinary 2.0 demon seeds who have no intelligence, ordinary demon seeds have no wisdom and will not be afraid, but these high-level demon seeds are very intelligent and have various emotions, so they will naturally be afraid.

They never expected that Ye Tianxiu's lower mid-level peak realm god clone would be even more terrifying, and in the absence of a realm crack to suppress his strength, he could burst out with such terrifying combat power.

They miscalculated!

"Run, we can't beat it!"

These high-level peak realm gods immediately began to flee.

And Ye Tian tried his best to intercept it, but he only stopped one high-level peak demon seed and killed him, while the other high-level peak demon seeds fled.

However, it was already good to be able to kill two high-level peak demon seeds.

And after this battle, the demon seeds will definitely be afraid, and they won't send too many demon seeds in to send them to death.
